summary: Iteration 81: Verified CSS bug fix - app no longer appears as blank black screen. All features tested and working: Landing page renders correctly, navigation with 6 pillars visible, Split View system functional, login works, dashboard with Cosmic Mood Ring visible, Breathing/Meditation/Star Chart/Coach pages all load correctly, Sora 2 Intro Video button opens video modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 confirms CSS bug fix: The conflicting .page-enter CSS definitions (one setting opacity:0 as base, another with animation) have been resolved by removing the first definition. App now renders correctly. All features verified: 1) Landing page with 'The ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE' hero visible, 2) Navigation bar with 6 pillars (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore), 3) Split View button opens dropdown and creates side-by-side iframe panel, 4) Login with test@test.com/password works, 5) Dashboard shows Cosmic Mood Ring and daily wisdom, 6) Breathing page with patterns and enhanced circle, 7) Meditation page with categories and guided sessions, 8) Star Chart with 3D WebGL canvas and controls (World Skies, Stargazing Journey, Mythology, Badges), 9) Coach/Sage page with conversation interface, 10) Sora 2 Intro Video button opens video modal. Set localStorage 'zen_tour_seen' to 'true' to skip guided tour.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
GET /api/mood-ring - returns mood data with auth token
frontend_ui: CRITICAL CSS FIX VERIFIED: Landing page renders correctly (not blank/black)
Hero section with 'The ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE' title visible
Navigation bar with 6 pillars (Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage)
Split View button visible in navigation
Split View dropdown opens with page options
Split View panel opens as fixed overlay with iframe
Quick Reset button visible and clickable
Begin Journey button navigates to auth
Take the Tour button visible
Sora 2 Intro Video button ('Watch the Cosmic Journey') opens video modal
Login with test@test.com / password works
Dashboard shows welcome message after login
Breathing page loads with patterns (Box Breathing, 4-7-8, etc.)
Breathing page has enhanced circle with 'READY' state
Meditation page loads with categories (Guided, Cosmic, Build Your Own, Timer)
Meditation page shows meditation cards with 'Begin Guided Session'
Star Chart page loads with 3D WebGL canvas
Star Chart has controls (World Skies, Stargazing Journey, Mythology, Badges, Gyro)
Coach/Sage page loads with conversation history
Coach page shows 'New Conversation' button

css_fix_verification.issue: Conflicting .page-enter CSS definitions caused app to appear as blank black screen
css_fix_verification.root_cause: First definition (line 545) set opacity:0 as base state, second definition (line 968) had animation from opacity:0 to 1. After animation completed, element reverted to first definition's opacity:0
css_fix_verification.fix_applied: Removed the first .page-enter definition, kept only the animation version
css_fix_verification.verification: Landing page now renders correctly with all content visible
